description: 求职简历。英式也常说 CV (curriculum vitae)。面试时带一份 printed copy。
examples_json: [{"en":"I've brought a copy of my resume.","zh":"我带了一份简历。"}]

description: 工作岗位。比 job 更正式。apply for a position = 申请一个职位。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm applying for the marketing position.","zh":"我申请的是市场营销职位。"}]

description: 包括学历(degree)和技能证书(certificate)。What are your qualifications? = 你有什么资质？
examples_json: [{"en":"My qualifications include a bachelor's degree and two years of experience.","zh":"我的资质包括一个学士学位和两年经验。"}]

description: 教育背景+工作背景。Tell me about your background = 说说你的背景。
examples_json: [{"en":"Let me tell you a bit about my background.","zh":"让我简单介绍一下我的背景。"}]

description: 毕业。I graduated from... = 我毕业于...。fresh graduate = 应届毕业生。
examples_json: [{"en":"I graduated from Beijing University with a degree in Finance.","zh":"我毕业于北京大学，金融专业。"}]

description: 职业目标。面试必问：What are your career goals?
examples_json: [{"en":"My career goal is to become a project manager.","zh":"我的职业目标是成为项目经理。"}]

description: 实习。summer internship = 暑期实习。paid/unpaid internship = 有薪/无薪实习。
examples_json: [{"en":"I completed a three-month internship at a tech company.","zh":"我在一家科技公司完成了三个月实习。"}]

description: 工作职责。I was responsible for... = 我负责...。responsibilities = 职责(复数)。
examples_json: [{"en":"My main responsibility was managing the social media accounts.","zh":"我的主要职责是管理社交媒体账号。"}]

description: 成就/成果。面试中用具体数字展示 achievement 最有说服力。
examples_json: [{"en":"One of my achievements was increasing user engagement by 30%.","zh":"我的成就之一是将用户参与度提高了30%。"}]

description: 项目。work on a project = 做一个项目。lead a project = 领导项目。
examples_json: [{"en":"I worked on several projects during my internship.","zh":"实习期间我参与了几个项目。"}]

description: 截止日期。meet a deadline = 按时完成。tight deadline = 很赶的截止时间。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm used to working under tight deadlines.","zh":"我习惯了在紧迫的截止日期下工作。"}]

description: 优势/强项。One of my strengths is... = 我的一个优势是...。
examples_json: [{"en":"One of my strengths is my attention to detail.","zh":"我的一个优势是注重细节。"}]

description: 回答优缺点时别只说缺点——要说你在怎么改进。I'm working on... = 我正在改进...。
examples_json: [{"en":"One area I'm working on is public speaking.","zh":"我正在改进的一个方面是公开演讲。"}]

description: 团队合作能力。最常见的面试 strengths 之一。collaborate = 协作。
examples_json: [{"en":"Teamwork is one of my strengths.","zh":"团队合作是我的强项之一。"}]

description: 沟通能力。面试中的高频词。good communication skills = 良好的沟通能力。
examples_json: [{"en":"I believe I have strong communication skills.","zh":"我相信我有很强的沟通能力。"}]

description: 改进。I'm working on improving... = 我正在提升...。说缺点时的正确姿势。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm working on improving my time management.","zh":"我正在提升我的时间管理能力。"}]

description: 大学主修专业。My major is... / I majored in... = 我的专业是...。
examples_json: [{"en":"My major is Business Administration.","zh":"我的专业是工商管理。"}]

description: 学位。bachelor's degree = 学士
examples_json: master's = 硕士。
sort_order: [{"en":"I hold a bachelor's degree in Computer Science.","zh":"我拥有计算机科学学士学位。"}]

description: 上一份工作的职位。In my previous role... = 在我之前的职位中...。
examples_json: [{"en":"In my previous role, I managed a team of five.","zh":"在我之前的职位中，我管理一个五人的团队。"}]

description: 协作/合作。collaborate with = 与...合作。比 work with 更职业化。
examples_json: [{"en":"I collaborated with the design team on this project.","zh":"我与设计团队在这个项目上进行了协作。"}]

description: 适应力强——很受面试官欢迎的优势词。quick learner 更口语化。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm very adaptable and enjoy new challenges.","zh":"我适应力很强，喜欢迎接新挑战。"}]

description: 时间管理能力。最常见的待改进缺点——因为容易展示你在改进。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm working on my time management skills.","zh":"我在改善我的时间管理能力。"}]

description: I'm applying for... = 我申请的是...。apply for a job/position。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm applying for the junior developer position.","zh":"我申请的是初级开发工程师职位。"}]

description: 期待。面试结束语：I look forward to hearing from you。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm really looking forward to this opportunity.","zh":"我非常期待这个机会。"}]

description: 处理/应对。handle pressure = 应对压力。handle multiple tasks = 同时处理多项任务。
examples_json: [{"en":"I can handle multiple tasks at the same time.","zh":"我可以同时处理多项任务。"}]

description: 客户。customer 多指零售客户，client 多指长期合作关系。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was responsible for communicating with clients.","zh":"我负责与客户沟通。"}]

description: 注重细节——经典面试优势词。attention to detail = 对细节的关注。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm very detail-oriented, which helps me catch errors early.","zh":"我非常注重细节，这能帮我在早期发现错误。"}]

description: 公开演讲。常见的待改进领域——真实但不会影响大部分工作。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm working on my public speaking skills.","zh":"我在提升我的公开演讲能力。"}]
